anomalies.t: NEW CRITICAL: 24 workflows (~30%) failed because copilot-harness can't write set_output file after agent succeeds. Pure harness bug masking real success.

NEW CRITICAL: Copilot CLI 1.0.48 attaches rejected `anthropic-beta: context-1m-2025-08-07` header → CAPIError 400 in 17 runs (14 failed). Suggests copilot CLI upgrade introduced bad header or proxy/CAPI no longer accepts this Claude beta.
Success rate collapsed to 41.6% (was 75.6% yesterday, ~85-93% earlier week). Driven by the two new criticals above.
Codex engine still 75-100% fail — model gpt-5.5 invalid. 3 of 4 runs failed today. Yesterday's fix did not stick.
Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer $5.55 (down from $8.54). Still 23% of daily spend.
PR Sous Chef turns vary 6-52 (avg 20.8). 60% failure but largely ENOENT-driven.
Deployment Incident Monitor cancels in 1.0s, both runs.
Design Decision Gate hit 20-turn cap with permission denials on git commit/fetch.
Daily News fails: node not in AWF chroot path. Exit 127.
